description: Ashley Spradlin discusses optimistic and zero-knowledge rollups and their role in blockchain scalability. The conversation includes an introduction to scaling solutions, the blockchain trilemma, and the importance of education in the crypto space.
topic_summary: The webinar covers the necessity of scaling solutions in blockchain technology, focusing on optimistic and zero-knowledge rollups, their advantages, and challenges. It emphasizes the balance of decentralization, security, and scalability in blockchain systems [t=343.48].
